user.title: Flic Hub
user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look at the documentation. Default port is 8124

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.

flichub_invalid_server_version.title: Invalid server version on FlicHub
flichub_invalid_server_version.description: The TCP server on the FlicHub is running version `{flichub_version}` which does not match the required version `{required_version}`. Please update the TCP server on the FlicHub.
